text:
hi in rahu dasa. Ketu is in sixth house. From Chandra
lagna it is third house. Her Sade sathi is in peak. The tenth house will be transited by
rahu. Therefore jayalalitha has less chances of winning.
Another reason is that mars came to closer to earth. Mars means south direction and
every chief minister lost the seat in the last two years after mars coming closer to
earth. In kerela A.K.Anthony, in Karnataka Dharam Singh, in Andhra it is Chandra
Babu Naidu, in Madhya Pradesh Uma Bharathi and one more person. Even in srilanka
Rajapakse. Therefore only one person is remaining in the entire batch is Jayalalitha.

Another important thing is that, her career will not be over. She will make a come
back but then it has years to go by. For the moment the finale cup of Tamilnadu
election will be won by karunanidhi but there will be twist.
Due to health reasons he can avoid chief minister post and nominate some one. With
starting of mercury dasa it will spell probably end of rising sun.
